description: Very excellent with I would love to use this every time I am designing a website.
author: Tichaona Redemptor R.
pros: SITE123 offers a range of templates covering different industries and styles. Users can select a template that aligns with their business or personal preferences.
cons: While SITE123 integrates with some third-party tools and services, users looking for extensive integration options or specific integrations may find the platform lacking compared to more advanced website builders.

review_title: Site123 Has Been a Dream Come True for Me
description: I enjoy the site and admire how easy it is to make a professional-looking site with the tools offered on the website. I am proud of the way my site looks and how attractive it is to my visitors.
author: Robert B.
pros: The ease of getting started was attractive to me. I had a website I was proud of within less than a week of learning the website. Since then, I have been able to embellish and make adjustments to my presentations of my ebooks, stories, and other writings. I had always dreamed about giving my stories a stage to shine and Site123 has allowed me to make this dream come true. People rave about the attractiveness and easy to use writing site I have made using the variety of tools available on this site. My many writings are special to me, like my own children in some ways. I am able to dress these stories up so they look good to others who come and visit my site.
cons: I have only one concern: Bandwidth. I have been adding many items to my stories and this apparently has caused me to almost approach my monthly limit of bandwidth. This is a concern and one that could cause me to shop elsewhere. I have asked for help on this subject, but have yet to receive much satisfaction. I guess I will simply have to avoid doing too much additions to my site each month until I can find some other remedy.

author: Joanna B.
pros: You can use it as an online shop and it has Canadian currency.
cons: When I respond to people through the website, the email looks like spam to the recipient. I also can't marked off days on the calendar to prevent people from placing orders when I'm unavailable.

review_title: Great Option for Small Business Owners
description: Overall, the positives currently outweigh the negatives. If the "cons" are addressed, then the system will be ideal for most of my online needs. I have quite a few more projects that I'd like to complete, and the "cons" are holding me back.
author: David E.
pros: The Site123 administrative panel is relatively simple to manage, and there is 24/7 online chat support to answer any questions about a particular function. The sites look professional, and there are a number of nice features and integrations in the Site123 system.
cons: 1) I am VERY frustrated by the 2,000-character limit in each section of custom code. I still have over 90% of my allotted space (10 GB) available for use, so I am not clear as to why this limit is so low. I would create several more websites on Site123 if this limit were lifted to at least 5,000 characters. The limit seems arbitrary - customers HATE arbitrary limits.2) I am frustrated at the 200-page limit for the entire site. I understand that there have been some performance issues for other customers when they exceed 200 pages on their site, but that is Site123's issue to figure out. Again, I still have over 90% of my allotted space (10 GB), so it is frustrating not to be able to use it due to a technical issue.

description: Just amazing. Never felt like I can't do anything with editing this website and if i do they are there to help.
author: Nicolas C.
pros: What I loved most is the level of simplicity in editing any aspect of the site and the speed of implementation of those edits. and the customer support is like no other i have experienced. Very fast response and guide you to resolve the issue. Never had a problem with them, they are all amazing!
cons: Nothing bad really, but It'd be nice to have more gradient colors for the background to make it less boxed and sharp. Probably integrate having images behind the entire website as a background If possible.

description: I basically wanted to give my Internet Radio Station a nice home and it did that. I had loads of help from the staff at Site 123. I got assistance at any time of the day or night, and they responded in a short space of time. I am still exploring and enjoying. I also like the fact that I can make money building websites for other persons. although I haven't closed a deal as yet because I have been busy, but I soon will.
author: Jacqueline M.
pros: It is easy to use and its attractive. I like the fact that you can design a professional looking website with all the features that's necessary.
cons: I believe it could have had some more modern themes.

description: I love SITE123, and I will continue to work with them, also i recommend SITE123 to all general customers and new business who aim to deal with B2B strategy.
author: Josip M.
pros: Simplicity, ease of use, control of the site you as a customer are buying. The professional and careful support works 24/7 is just a mere gold on top of the cake . Would recommend everybody !
cons: There a few graphical bugs. no detailed or advanced editor (like wix)

review_title: Cheaper option of Shopify but better in value
description: This is still the best hosting company I have ever worked with. I'm glad I decided to invest in them! Wish they offer better price for shorter contract. I went with 10 years contract since the price is just so good to ignore, very tempting. However, with a lot of plugins required for running the website successful, I did have a lot of worries before. Thank god the support team was amazing
author: Molly R.
pros: Very helpful and almost always available customer service Plugins functions allow users to have more control of the website. The instruction to setup plugins can be a little confused, but I always have the support of the customer service (Shout out to [SENSITIVE CONTENT], he is the best!) to guide me through the whole process. This is very beneficial consider if it was Shopify, I would have to pay extra monthly to have these done
cons: Shopping cart lacks of flexibility, which can cause customers inconvenient. Some basic plugins could have been pre-setup, for example, Google Search Console
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The process from beginning to publishing took an hour! It was best case scenario.
author: Nina M.
pros: The templates are already pre sized to optimally work on desktop and mobile. There was not any technical changes needed.the customer service on the chat feature was immensely helpful and fast!
cons: None at the time but a con may be to someone that the design choices are basic
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overally SITE123 is very easy to use and a great starter website builder.
author: Tom F.
pros: Super easy to use. No coding experience needed which is great.
cons: Not able to get very granular since coding functionality is stripped back.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Krunal P.
pros: SITE123 offers multilingual languages to choose from with automatic translations and is simple to use while viewing content.
cons: Cons of SITE123 include the lack of mobile application presence with IOS or Android. This would dramatically enhance the capabilities for targeted audience for usage.

review_title: A solid web solution for most businesses
description: First contact with the builder is very positive. Anyone can get going and set up a decent fully working homepage. System offers almost everything straight "out of the box" a business needs to compete in any market. The simple but limited "building blocks" makes it easy to add information. Some settings can be a bit fiddly to use, as it's not really WYSIIWYG, but more of a back end setting. Once mastered though, any implementation of information is easy archived. Compared to f.i. WordPress, Site123 is much more intuitive and simple to set up and update. There are more competitive online web builders on the market today that offers better design features and even some that are more easy to use. But the selling point of Site123 is the coverage of built in solutions that only very few other builders are able to match. For small to medium sized businesses in the BtB market, I would recommend Site123 anytime. In the BtC market Site123 may fall short of being flexible enough to compete visually.
author: John F.
pros: Site123 is an intuitive web builder with lots of high end solutions built in. It's a solid solution for most businesses, probably best aimed at inhouse users with no or limited design skills. The system offers everything from mail sign up, site search, multiple languages and even email marketing to name a few competitive" must have tools", and that straight out of the box. Support is one of the absolutely best in business, with 24/7 support
cons: The system can be a bit visually limited, which can be particularly frustrating for designers designing for customers. Layout system lacks the flexibility that can differentiate a webpage from other sites in a competitive market. This on the other hand is also the strength of the builder, as none-designers safely can design something that is working just fine for their customers, just lacking that special touch.

description: Shocking. I never get support when I have a problem. I have had issues with PayPal connectivity and today no one can pay using their credit cards. It makes my business look unprofessional. I have lost customers
author: Cheryl H.
pros: Nothing. It Is too time consuming and has huge problems.
cons: Too time consuming. You contact someone when you have an issue, it gets escalated then you never hear anything again. I hate it. As soon as I can I’m opting out. Even that is a nightmare because I have thousands of products and can’t easily transfer them. I will have to create another website from scratch.

review_title: I dont know I was asked to review I am just following the lead :)
description: I love site123 cos its easy and quick to use and I recommend it all the time.
author: raisibe M.
pros: The quality the feel and design IS AMAIZING
cons: but I still think you should bring more tamplate because everything is the same and there is not much munipulation you can do make it and move it around as yyou please everthing is standard but its so expensive I suggest there should be reseller accounts if there was I think you could attract more clients because I literaly just ad 6% extra for profit to just lay it out and design

review_title: Just short of excellent - which is a pity.
description: On line sales - especially being able to offer pay instore facilities, this is more suitable for our demographic who are still wary of web based card use.
author: Peter C.
pros: Ease of use24 hour online chat support - which has never failed to receive 5* reviews when used.Flexible features.
cons: Inability to import and export data to and from CSV and/or spreadsheet formats. This is especially vital for inventory management and is definitely the Achilles Heel of this software.

description: n/a
author: Sharon R.
pros: EASY AS 123. No learning curve and can put a simple, functioning website together in less than an hour
cons: Geared entirely towards business and not considering small non-profits

description: easy to use and affordable
author: Aiden H.
pros: easy user face. the quick response for when I need help
cons: access of ad ins like google analytics as well as SEO integrations

review_title: Good software so I expect more development
description: overall it's good, with reasonable price we really expanded our business. But I expect you will have more and more features to make the website customer friendly!
author: Tomoko Y.
pros: Easy to start, easy to manage. I was not good at managing website but even I could do. Also help centre is working very well. They promptly answer my questions. I appreciate it so much!
cons: What I strongly expect you to improve are;- we can't set different cover photos for laptop and phone- not possible to automatically set shipping fee - less options for letter format

description: Not exactly what I asked for. I wanted my business to be visible on google search so customers can make use of my services but I can’t see this happening. I have tried everything and all the guide your customer representatives gave me did not work. I have linked the google console as instructed, yet nothing is happening for the past two months.
author: Chioma M.
pros: The website design and outlook is amazing, easy to build, or design
cons: My business never appears on google search engine when people type cleaners near me. I have not made use of the money and time invested in this website. I wish your company will do something different. Other companies are calling me now to help me out. Meaning I may be starting afresh.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I needed a landing page for my new business and couldn't afford to outsource. I tried a couple of other free sites first but one was very basic and the other was too complicated for me. Then I found site 123 and for me it was a game changer! It's easy to use and the result is very professional! I started with the free version then got the paid version which is excellent value for money!
author: Carolyn S.
pros: As someone with no experience building a website it was easy to use, intuitive, excellent options, and the help function is fantastic!
cons: Having a visible menu on every page so people don't have to go back to the main menu each time. Although that might be my setup

review_title: Site123 an good entry level app for developing websites
description: over all Site123 is ang excellent app if you want to build a website in a hurry, and its easy to use, it is also perfect for beginners.
author: Ginno C.
pros: Site123 is easy to use when you need to build a decent website quickly. its use of AI on when writing descriptions or slogans are very impressive. it reduces the amount of time thinking what to say the AI will will do that for you.
cons: its image editor feature can crop, filter and beautify your images but it cannot reduce images to fit the page, rendering it useless.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Site 123 for me has exceeded my expectation and has been a pleasurable experience so far.
author: Andrew J.
pros: User friendliness and customizability of software.
cons: Some of the design features need updating.

review_title: I visited the website to play around but I ended up liking it so much
description: It's really depending on what you want, we as a team go the best experience we could get. There is support so they are always there to give you tips or you can tell them what you want to do and they will guide you to do it. Some of them even step by step, like really step by step. If you try the platform and you don't know what you want to do, then do not do it at all. Be sure for what you want and most of all, be sure that what you want to do in doable in general. There were things I wanted to do but they are not really possible to be done.
author: Anna P.
pros: Let's start with the fact that I was previously using a code only platform and I really wanted to make a professional website for my team and get it live to attract new visitors. It's basically what I was looking for in a website builder. I have tried multiple online but SITE123 gave me the freedom to take my team on the web and get it live with our domain name. It's a very easy to use platform and they offer many applications to use and index your website to Google and other search engines which what I really needed. Because of this website we were able to increase awareness as I have seen the difference with the hosting I had, the servers response time is 5x times faster than the Shared Hosting plan I had with another website. Very powerful platform I would say, and it really got my message out.
cons: I would appreciate if they had sidebars like WordPress themes but for now I was able to make what I wanted. I might not be able to add my own HTML to the platform for some specific apps I wanted but I was able to find something at least similar to their app market, it did the job (not the one I wanted) but if you try to find there is always a way to get things done even when you are limited to the option they offer. I was expecting to use more the custom Iframe but it turned out the Application integration were more useful than any other features offered.

review_title: So much better than the competition
description: I spent almost two weeks with InterServer and wasted money on various ad-ons that are required to host a website at that location. I quit after two weeks with no progress and went to Site123. In 3 days the new website is up and running.
author: Ken G.
pros: It uses plain English and does not overwhelm the novice which IT language. The software did what it was designed to do without requiring additional software or steps. Go right to what you want to do to the site and it does it, without having to do something else first.
cons: A library of articles on help topics would make a nice link. Accessing them directly without going through the Help Chat function would be expedient.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Debbie T.
pros: it is easy to navigate, create and recreate to your liking.
cons: when being advertised, it is not mentioned that your pay domain separate then second time renewing.that for me was a bummer.
